data.title: Brazil Set to Launch World’s First spot XRP ETF
data.description:
• The world’s first spot XRP exchange-traded fund (ETF) has been approved by Brazil’s securities regulator, the Comissão de Valores Mobiliários (CVM).
  • Named HASHDEX NASDAQ XRP FUNDO DE ÍNDICE, the fund is currently in a pre-operational phase.

data.title: TradFi Investors Piled $38.7B Into Bitcoin ETFs, Three Times More Than Previous Quarter
data.description:
• Institutional investors tripled their holdings of spot bitcoin ETFs in Q4 2024, reaching $38.7B, SEC filings show.
  • Major funds like Wisconsin’s pension board and Paul Tudor Jones’ hedge fund significantly boosted their bitcoin ETF stakes.
  • BlackRock’s iShares Bitcoin Trust (IBIT) now has over 1,100 institutional holders, a potential record for a first-year ETF.

data.title: Ethereum L1 Monad Joins Forces With Near-Based Orderly Network for DeFi Boost
data.description:
• Orderly’s band of 20 or so market makers includes Wintermute, Selini and Riverside, according to a press release.
  • The Monad testnet launching on Wednesday will attract many users with the possibility of airdrops on the layer-1 blockchain.

data.title: Bitcoin Rewards App Fold Volatile in Wall Street Debut
data.description:
• Bitcoin rewards app Fold Holdings went public on Wednesday via SPAC merger with Nasdaq-listed FTAC Emerald Acquisition Corp.
  • Fold is now the latest publicly firm with bitcoin on its balance sheet, holding 1,000 BTC worth $96 million.
  • FLD shares rallied 30% in early action before giving back a sizable portion of those gains.

data.title: U.S. Crypto Investors Are Still Piling Into Memecoins Despite the Huge Risks: Kraken
data.description:
• A Kraken survey of U.S. crypto holders showed that 85% invested in memecoins.
  • FOMO was mentioned as one of the main reasons for investing in these highly volatile cryptocurrencies.
  • 42% of those surveyed said they believed memecoins would outperform other cryptos in 2025.

data.title: Crypto Market Maker Wintermute Eyes U.S. Expansion: Bloomberg
data.description:
• Wintermute, one of the largest market makers in crypto, plans to expand into the U.S. with a New York office and over-the-counter trading products.
  • The expansion is driven by optimism about potential regulatory changes under the Trump administration.

data.title: Binance.US Restores US Dollar Deposits and Withdrawals
data.description:
• Binance.US customers can once again deposit and withdraw USD using bank transfer (ACH), and trade over 160 cryptocurrencies.
  • The firm’s ability to handle USD deposits and withdrawals was choked out of existence under the previous Biden administration.

data.title: Bitcoin Not to Be 'Lumped Together' With Crypto: Czech Central Bank Chief Michl
data.description:
• Czech National Bank Governor Ales Michl made clear he's aware of the difference between bitcoin and crypto.
  • His comments came after the high-profile memecoin rugpulls over the past few days.
  • The Czech central bank is currently studying the possible benefits of adding alternative assets — bitcoin among them — to its balance sheet.

data.title: Wingbits to Launch Satellite to Boost Flight Tracking Accuracy
data.description:
• Wingbits, a blockchain-powered aviation data network, is launching a satellite with Spire Global on SpaceX’s Transporter-13 mission.
  • The satellite will cross-check flight data provided by the DePIN project's 2,200-plus ground-based nodes to prevent spoofing and enhance accuracy.
  • The data provided by enthusiasts across 90 countries helps Wingbits compete with FlightAware and Flightradar24.

data.title: Franklin Templeton Brings Tokenized U.S. Treasury Fund to European Investors
data.description:
• Franklin Templeton has launched the first fully tokenized U.S. Treasury fund registered in Luxembourg.
  • The U.S-based version of the Franklin OnChain U.S. Government Money Fund has attracted $580 million of assets since its 2021 debut.
  • The fund will be available to institutional investors across eight European countries.
